payload.answer: Draft a research plan to investigate how intelligence relates to language (e.g., cognitive-linguistic mechanisms, bidirectionality, measurement issues), without asserting specific causal claims.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific study/author/entities were mentioned; only a general topic relationship is provided.

memory_cards.statement: User wants to research the relationship between human intelligence and language.

details: Stored the user's high-level research intent as low-confidence memory; no durable factual claims recorded.

repair_options: Ask what aspect of the relationship to focus on (e.g., comprehension vs production, IQ vs linguistic ability, developmental trajectory, neurological correlates).
Ask for target populations (children, adults, bilinguals, clinical groups) and preferred study types (behavioral, neuroimaging, longitudinal).
